title: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN

summary:
Main
In tankers this week, Hyundai Mipo announced that Pertamina International Shipping ordered fifteen firm 50k dwt MR product tankers, with the series being split into three distinct series
Source: Clarkson Platou (Hellas) ltd
